idea-plugin.name: Geblang
idea-plugin.description:
Geblang language support for IntelliJ-based IDEs.

  • Syntax highlighting for .gb files (keywords, types, strings, numbers, comments, operators)
  • File type recognition with icon
  • Brace matching for {} [] ()
  • Line and block comment toggling (Ctrl+/ and Ctrl+Shift+/)
  • Configurable color scheme under Settings > Editor > Color Scheme > Geblang
  • LSP integration via LSP4IJ: diagnostics, code completion, go-to-definition, hover, find usages, rename, formatting — all powered by geblang lsp
  • Settings page under Languages & Frameworks > Geblang to configure the path to the geblang executable

Requirements: The geblang binary must be installed and accessible (on PATH or configured in settings) for LSP features to activate. LSP4IJ is declared as a required dependency and is installed automatically.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0 (prototype)
  • Initial release: syntax highlighting, brace matching, commenter, LSP integration

server.name: Geblang Language Server
server.description: Language server for Geblang (.gb files). Launched as geblang lsp (stdio transport). Provides diagnostics, completion, hover, go-to-definition, find usages, rename, and formatting via the canonical Geblang compiler. Configure the binary path in Settings > Languages & Frameworks > Geblang.
